---
title: "Animation in research"
author: "Pierre Gloaguen"
date: ""
---

```{r}
#| label: setup-teaching
#| include: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

- Every two years since 2022, I have been coorganizing (with Lucia Clarotto, Sophie Donnet and Eric Parent) the [Statistiques au sommet de Rochebrune workshop](Rochebrune/Rochebrune.html).
- In 2025, I coorganized with S. Le Corff, N. Jouvin and J. Stoehr, an automn school on [Recent advances in Machine learning](https://mlataussois.sciencesconf.org/).
